the Medicaid funds in a budget are spent), or both Hiring and Budget Authority. 

SHORT NAME: SELF_DRCTN_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: SELF_DRCTN_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 

VALUES: 000 = Not Applicable 
001 = Hiring Authority 
002 = Budget Authority 
003 = Hiring and Budget Authority 
Null/missing = Source value
